Repository-specific Copilot Agents live under .github/agents/ as *.agent.md files.
Naming: use kebab-case (e.g., feature-agent.agent.md) and keep names descriptive.
Each agent should have a clear purpose and scope documented at the top of the file.

### Current Agents
- ng-gighub.agent.md - Main project agent for Angular development
- onboarding.agent.md - Onboarding assistance for new contributors
- repo-name.agent.md - Repository naming conventions
- review.agent.md - Code review assistance

### Adding New Agents
1. Create a new *.agent.md file in this directory
2. Follow the template structure from ./templates/
3. Document the agent's purpose, scope, and usage
4. Update this README with a brief description

### Resources
- Templates: ./templates/
- Assets: ./assets/
